case_title: BEVERLY J. SELGA VS. KIMBERLY E. HICKMAN

docket_entries.description: ORIGINAL NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT ON SISTER-STATE JUDGMENT AND PROOF OF SERVICE ON APPLICATION AND NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT ON SISTER-STATE JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF SELGA, BEVERLY J. SERVED SEP-20-2005, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT HICKMAN, KIMBERLY E. PROCESS COMPLETED BY DEFAULT SECTION. WRIT MAY ISSUE ON OCT-21-2005 IF NO MOTION FILED BY DEFENDANT

APPLICATION FOR ENTRY OF SISTER STATE JUDGMENT; NOTICE OF SISTER STATE JUDGMENT ISSUED FILED BY PLAINTIFF SELGA, BEVERLY J. AS TO DEFENDANT HICKMAN, KIMBERLY E. JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1710.25 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SELGA, BEVERLY J. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HICKMAN, KIMBERLY E. $9,648.20 PRINCIPAL, $500.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $10.15 INTEREST, $308.15 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $10,466.50, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT ALL FURTHER PROCESSING TO BE DONE BY DEFAULT SECTION
